productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Hayward 25m B Black Backpacks
description: Fun, style, and comfort are the highlights of this black nike Hayward backpack with a  Sport Fit system. Carry it to college, office, or a casual day out with your friends. A good looking bag, with lots of space, it will accomodate everything you can think of, while you strut around looking super funky!MeasurementHeight: 47 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 20 cmCapacity: 25 litresMade of 100% polyester for enhanced durability and style100% nylon lining for increased durabilityOne main roomy zippered compartment with a separate well-padded laptop enclosure with Velcro fastenerSecond compartment with a detailed organizer for storing essentialsExterior media-player zip pocket on the top to keep your player secure and protectedBrand tab on the frontPadded, adjustable shoulders straps engineered with Sport Fit System, with mesh lining,  to absorb shock and cushion the shoulder, distributing loads more evenlyErgonomic design to fit along the torso comfortably with mesh for better ventilation, engineered with Sport Fit System Haul loop for handling easeBranding on strapBranded zippers and sliders for easy useCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
